descriptions.en: Robot head representing an autonomous software agent.
descriptions.ru: Голова робота, обозначающая автономного программного агента.

provenance.attribution: Project-authored by repository owner and maintainer kroffske.

descriptions.en: Chat interface for a conversation with a large language model.
descriptions.ru: Интерфейс диалога с большой языковой моделью.

provenance.attribution: Project-authored by repository owner and maintainer kroffske.

descriptions.en: Agent paired with a checklist of planned steps.
descriptions.ru: Агент рядом с контрольным списком запланированных шагов.

descriptions.en: Tool or wrench invoked by an agent action.
descriptions.ru: Инструмент или ключ, вызываемый действием агента.

descriptions.en: Central router branching toward multiple callable functions.

descriptions.en: Documents being retrieved as context for a language model.

descriptions.en: Bounded stack of messages or documents available to a model.

descriptions.en: Multiple agents exchanging competing arguments or proposals.

descriptions.en: Dashboard screen combining several model and system metrics.

descriptions.en: Model or chip launched into a serving environment.

descriptions.en: Backward arrow returning software or a model to an earlier version.

descriptions.en: Two-by-two classification matrix of predicted and actual outcomes.

descriptions.en: Receiver operating characteristic curve plotted against a diagonal baseline.

descriptions.en: Balance scale comparing precision with recall.
